title: Coco's Mods
description: This is the newest version of every mod I use. Client Side :^)
body:
The main Point of this modpack is that the viewers of my channel [coco7777](https://www.youtube.com/@coco7777-mc/videos) can use the same mods I use. 

**Why should I get this modpack?**
Because I'm kinda an expert with client side mods with 3 years of experience in choosing client side mods and making them compatible. This is probably the biggest client side modpack that you have ever used but I promise that it works clean and smoth. And you won't notice even most of them but every mod has a reason to exist like sodium wich makes the game faster.

**Content**
This modpack uses 97 mods to make Minecraft more beautiful and more practical to play with things like: Apple skin to see the hunger stats, Freecam to look around more freely and skin layers 3d to make minecraft more beautiful.
Every mod I add is for one of these reasons. 
[Entire modlist here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Ajflk9J-BVvE2Nk0ulHZgguxi8E3HNJQ8yuELMv-7D4/edit?usp=sharing)

**This works?**
This client side mod is tested on Alinea and from me([coco7777](https://www.youtube.com/@coco7777-mc/videos)). As a youtuber I want also the best viewing experience for my viewer so I try to make minecraft really beatifull without makin it laggy or distracting. I also try to add a lot of shortcuts so you can focus on the Important part.


*This modpack might be slower on Older Computers especially when running the complementary shader or turning up grafics*


*I am not responsible for any ban or consequenzes while using it.*
